jobs.prompt: 16:9 abstract editorial illustration for a university linear algebra lecture on linear dependence, basis, and matrix rank. Visual metaphor: several geometric vectors where some align into a shared plane while one stands independent, conveying dependent vs independent directions. Warm paper background #faf9f5, ink-like forms #141413, dusty blue #6a9bcc, terracotta #d97757, olive #788c5d. Premium academic magazine style, restrained composition, generous negative space. Absolutely no readable text, letters, digits, formulas, chart axes, or UI.

16:9 abstract editorial illustration about the Kronecker-Capelli criterion: two layered geometric structures, one case where dimensions match and lock together, and another where an extra offset layer causes incompatibility. Subtle split-scene composition suggesting consistent vs inconsistent linear systems. Same restrained palette (#faf9f5, #141413, #6a9bcc, #d97757, #788c5d), diffuse light, soft paper grain. No digits, no letters, no equations, no fake charts.
